examples: It astonishes me (that) he could be so thoughtless.
I seem to be in evil case—and all for an innocent and thoughtless pleasantry.
How very thoughtless. I'll give him a piece of my mind.
The game thrives on casual, thoughtless purchases, but pulls in fans with surprisingly deep gameplay.
That is not to excuse the boorish, thoughtless or vile activities of powerful men who should have known better.
